body: Thanks so much for the follow-up, Amara — I really appreciated our conversation last week and wanted to share a few updates before our next check-in. We've just closed out our pilot with [CarbonLedger](carbonledger.co) enterprise beta customers and the retention numbers are holding strong at 94% after 60 days, which I think speaks to the stickiness of the core workflow. On the fundraising side, we're starting to formalize our seed round and would love to explore whether [Halfway Capital](halfway.vc) sees a fit here given your climate infrastructure focus. I've attached our updated deck and a one-pager with the pilot cohort data — happy to walk through the numbers on a call whenever works for your schedule. Let me know if there's anything else you'd like to see ahead of that conversation.
